calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: Susan Lee #4280

Stanley J. Michael, Esq. appeared for plaintiff California State Automobile Assoc.
Plaintiff's Witness: SFPD Officer Robert J. Porter was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Kent Wong as follows:

Damages - $25,000.00
Costs - $400.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $25,400.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
